title: Ayanami Rei totem
description: This package includes four versions of totems with Ayanami Rei.
body:
The pack contains four versions of totems of undying with Ayanami Rei.
To work, the totem of undying needs to be renamed to:
1) Mini Rei of Undying1 (white flat)
2) Mini Rei of Undying2 (black flat)
3) Plush Rei of Undying1 (white 3D)
4) Plush Rei of Undying2 (black 3D)
(to work needed optifine or CIT)


![preview of totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/H8MCabUP/images/e7b401a6fbb502be26da8539689f78ad65c61f1f.png)
